title: GroundplanGraph
description: v1 of the source-agnostic Terraform graph. Everything in the product renders from this shape; nothing renders from raw plan.json or HCL. Frozen: bump `version` to evolve.

version.description: 1 = docs (hcl) snapshots; 2 adds optional node impact fields (GP-22); 3 adds optional node attribute-diff fields (GP-32). All stay valid.

type.description: Resource type (aws_ecs_service) or the literal "module" for synthetic module nodes.

provider.description: Provider name (aws); null for module nodes.

module_path.description: Module names from the root down to this node's parent module.

change.description: Planned action; null for snapshots not derived from a plan (docs flow).

impacted.description: v2: unchanged node that (transitively) depends on a changed node (GP-22).

impact_distance.description: v2: hop distance to the nearest changed node.

attribute_diff.description: v3: masked per-attribute before/after diff for a changed node (GP-32). Sensitive values are masked; nested changes collapse to a marker.

attribute_diff_truncated.description: v3: true when the changed-attribute list exceeded 20 and was capped.

kind.description: contains = module hierarchy; depends_on = resource dependency.

inferred.description: depends_on only: true when inferred from an expression reference, false when explicitly declared (GP-20/GP-21).
